address: Talad Gao Road, Tambon Suan Dok, Amphoe Muang, Lampang 52000

description.en: Weekend walking street market along the Wang River featuring local food, crafts, live music, and a charming heritage shophouse atmosphere. The best place to sample Lampang's signature foods and buy local ceramics.
description.nl: Weekend walking street markt langs de Wang-rivier met lokaal eten, ambachten, live muziek en een charmante erfgoed-winkelpandsfeer. De beste plek om Lampangs kenmerkende gerechten te proeven en lokale keramiek te kopen.

metaTitle.en: Kad Kong Ta Walking Street - Top Attraction in Lampang | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Kad Kong Ta Walking Street - Top Attractie in Lampang | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Discover Kad Kong Ta Walking Street in Lampang. Weekend riverside market with local food, crafts and heritage atmosphere.
metaDescription.nl: Ontdek Kad Kong Ta Walking Street in Lampang. Weekend markt aan de rivier met lokaal eten, ambachten en erfgoedsfeer.
